summary: The CI job failed because a wget command in the Dockerfile received an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error when attempting to download the nydus binary from GitHub releases. This caused the Docker build step to fail with exit code 1, which propagated as a buildx bake failure.
root_cause: A transient HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error from GitHub's servers caused the wget download of the nydus static binary (https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/v2.4.0/nydus-static-v2.4.0-linux-amd64.tgz) to fail during the Docker build step.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: This is the direct error from wget showing a transient network/server error from GitHub when downloading the nydus binary.

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: This confirms the Docker build step failed due to the wget command returning a non-zero exit code.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: This is the final GitHub Actions error annotation confirming the buildx bake command failed due to the network error.

suggested_fix: Re-run the CI job as this is a transient network failure (HTTP 502 from GitHub). Alternatively, consider adding retry logic to the wget command in the Dockerfile (e.g., using `wget --tries=3`) or using a mirror/cache for the nydus binary download.
